117.title: Ticket schema
117.heading: id
117.snippet: string Unique ticket identifier. Defaults to the filename (without .md) when omitted.

118.title: Ticket schema
118.heading: repo
118.snippet: string Absolute path to the target git repo; presence makes this a PR-flow ticket, absence a Q&A ticket.

119.title: Ticket schema
119.heading: priority
119.snippet: low | normal | high Scheduling priority. Defaults to normal.

120.heading: timeout_minutes

123.title: Ticket schema
123.heading: pr_title
123.snippet: string Pull request title. Defaults to the first H1 heading in the ticket body, or the ticket id.

124.title: Ticket schema
124.heading: draft
124.snippet: boolean Open the pull request as a draft. Defaults to the daemon's configured draft_by_default.

125.title: Ticket schema
125.heading: labels
125.snippet: array Labels to apply to the pull request. Merged with the daemon's configured default_labels.

126.title: Ticket schema
126.heading: reviewers
126.snippet: array GitHub handles to request as pull request reviewers.

127.title: Ticket schema
127.heading: amends_pr
127.snippet: number Pull request number to amend (push additional commits to) instead of opening a new PR.

130.snippet: integer Worker-managed: how many transparent requeue attempts this ticket has consumed. Do not set by hand.
